parameters.content:
## Bulk Generate Payment Reminder PDFs from NocoDB

This workflow reads overdue invoices from a **NocoDB table**, generates a **personalized payment reminder PDF** for each record using the Autype Bulk Render API, and emails the resulting **ZIP archive** via SMTP — ideal for print-by-email services or internal distribution.

### Variable Types Used
- **String** — customer name, address, invoice number, company name, due date
- **Number** — amount due (USD), days overdue (auto-calculated)

### How it works
1. **Weekly Schedule** — Triggers every Monday (configurable).
2. **Get Overdue Invoices** — Reads all NocoDB rows where .
3. **Build Bulk Items** — Transforms rows into variable sets. Calculates days overdue automatically.
4. **Bulk Render** — Sends all items to Autype in a single batch. Downloads the ZIP.
5. **Send ZIP via Email** — Attaches the ZIP to an email sent via SMTP.

### One-time Setup
Use the orange setup flow above to create the project and template document via API, then copy the document ID into the **Build Bulk Items** code node.

### Requirements
- **n8n-nodes-autype** community node (self-hosted n8n)
- Autype API key from [app.autype.com](https://app.autype.com)
- NocoDB instance with an "Overdue Invoices or Cutomers" table
- SMTP credentials for email delivery

### One-time Setup
Run once to create the Autype project and payment reminder template document. Copy the returned document ID into the Build Bulk Items node. Then disable these nodes.

### 1. Get Overdue Invoices
Reads all rows from NocoDB where . Columns: 
- customer_name (text)
- customer_address (text)
- invoice_number (Number)
- amount_due (Number)
- due_date (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- company_name (text)

### 2. Build Bulk Items
Maps NocoDB rows to Autype variable sets. Calculates  from  vs. today. Sets the document ID.

### 3. Bulk Render
Sends all variable sets in one request. Downloads the output as a ZIP archive containing one PDF per invoice.

### 4. Send ZIP via Email
Emails the ZIP to a printer service, accounting team, or archive mailbox via SMTP.
